printed.name: Pulling Straps 1
printed.setup: Lying prone on Long Box, neutral spine position, legs straight and together, parallel to floor, feet plantarflexed toward footbar, arms straight, forward of shoulders, hands holding folded straps, palms facing each other

movement.inhale: Lift trunk, move arms back to sides of body
movement.exhale: Lower trunk, move arms forward, return to start position

cues: Articulate spine into extension starting from crown of head
Bring arms forward of shoulder line no more than 20 degrees
